sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78044" key="paraigia/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραιγῐάλ-ιος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰλ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.42</biblScope> </bibl> (<sense id="n78044.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-λοι</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
